incidents.title: Latency spike on payments API
incidents.summary: Checkout response time breached the customer SLA in three regions.
incidents.nextAction: Move traffic away from the overloaded node group and validate RDS connection pool recovery.

incidents.title: Kafka broker disk nearing threshold
incidents.summary: Storage growth followed an ingestion backlog after a reporting batch rerun.
incidents.nextAction: Complete retention policy cleanup and verify partition rebalance by end of day.

incidents.title: Internal VPN packet loss
incidents.summary: Packet loss affected office-to-cloud routing during the WAN provider maintenance window.
incidents.nextAction: Publish maintenance communication template before the next provider change.

services.name: Payments API
services.meta: Runbook, dashboards, and repo are linked. Dependency chain includes Redis and RDS.

services.name: Event Platform
services.meta: Streaming backbone for order, billing, and audit events.

services.name: Identity Gateway
services.meta: Missing backup owner is the main governance gap for this service.

services.name: Data Warehouse Sync
services.meta: Ownership needs to move from project setup into steady-state platform support.
